value: All malware-family and persistence anchors below are extracted from CERT-UA advisory #6315762 (22-May-2026), triangulated with The Hacker News, ESET WeLiveSecurity FrostyNeighbor report (14-May-2026), Bitdefender Draco, SC Media, SecurityAffairs, The Record, and SOC Prime. File hashes are deliberately not invented here; pull authoritative SHA1/SHA256/MD5 values from CERT-UA advisory body and SOC Prime TDM bundles when operationalising.
context: high

value: Cluster aliases: UAC-0057 (CERT-UA), UNC1151 (Mandiant / Google TIG), Ghostwriter (Mandiant), FrostyNeighbor (ESET), PUSHCHA (Trend Micro), Storm-0257 (Microsoft), TA445 (Proofpoint), Umbral Bison (CrowdStrike), White Lynx. Belarus-aligned, active since at least 2016.

value: C2 infrastructure pattern: Cloudflare-fronted .icu domains. CERT-UA's official advisory enumerates the specific FQDNs used in the May 2026 wave; pull them from the source advisory or SOC Prime TDM destination-IP / destination-domain feeds for current operationalisation. The .icu TLD anchor is durable across campaigns even after FQDN rotation.
context: high
C2 TLD heavily reused by UAC-0057 across multiple campaigns since 2022; statistically rare in legitimate enterprise outbound
UAC-0057 fronts C2 with Cloudflare to hide origin IPs and blend with legitimate CDN traffic

value: Discovery primitives observed in OYSTERBLUES profile-and-exfil: COMPUTERNAME, USERNAME, OS version (Win32_OperatingSystem.Caption / Version), LastBootUpTime, running process list. Exfil cadence ~10 minutes via HTTP POST to .icu C2.
context: high
Roundcube XSS exploited by UNC1151 in prior mailbox-compromise feeder campaign (CERT Polska 2025-06); supplies the compromised originating mailboxes used in current OYSTERFRESH delivery

value: Targeting: Ukrainian government and defense organisations. Companion ESET FrostyNeighbor PicassoLoader campaign (2026-05-14) additionally targets Poland (broader sectoral footprint including manufacturing healthcare logistics) and Lithuania. Ukraine-only geofencing observed in the PicassoLoader chain — sandbox detonation from non-Ukrainian egress will report false-negative.
context: high

value: Final payload: Cobalt Strike beacon delivered via JavaScript eval() after operator manual triage of the ~10-minute heartbeat. Post-exploitation tradecraft is standard Cobalt Strike (sleep mask, named pipes, malleable C2 profile, sometimes Rubeus and Mimikatz follow-on).
context: high

value: Defensive emphasis: restrict wscript.exe / cscript.exe execution for standard user accounts via SRP / WDAC / AppLocker; this single control breaks the OYSTERFRESH entry point.
context: high
